steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what Babou's actions and words best show. The key shift in the passage is Darius opening with 'I felt like a tourist' and closing with 'Maybe I wasn't such a tourist.' We need the choice that explains what caused that shift.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — To emphasize that Darius has been looking forward to an event.: The passage does not build toward an upcoming event; Babou's interaction is the event. ✗
  • Choice B — To demonstrate that Darius and Babou would prefer not to travel.: Neither Babou nor Darius discusses preferences about traveling. ✗
  • Choice C — To show that Babou affects the way Darius thinks of himself.: Babou fusses with Darius's appearance, gives him a searching look, and says 'I am glad you are here' — these actions directly prompt Darius's shift from outsider to someone who belongs. ✓
  • Choice D — To suggest that Babou and Mamou will visit Darius in the United States soon.: The passage focuses on this encounter, not on plans to return. ✗
C is correct.
